title: thymopsis thymoides
intro: Thymopsis thymoides, also known as the thyme-leaved pea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thymopsis thymoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, it is often made into a tea or used in tinctures, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
